setting.note: Gilded-Age Washington seen from a house on Lafayette Square, across from the White House: the Capitol, the drawing rooms, the corridors of a young capital. Adams knew the real city from the inside, and it brings Washington into the atlas.

rights.originalWork: TODO: confirm. Henry Adams published this in 1880.
